text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: -> APPROVED (amount == agreed) | PARTIAL_APPROVAL (0 < amount < agreed; creates exactly ONE remainder, null status) -> PROCESSED (guard: status in {APPROVED, PARTIAL_APPROVAL}; terminal, no un-process). pending/PROCESSED -> RESCHEDULED (first reschedule captures o

riginalDate). Approve validation: amount > 0 AND <= agreed, else BadRequestException and stays pending. Schedule LOCKED (upsert + delete silently skipped) if ANY installment in {APPROVED, PARTIAL_APPROVAL, PROCESSED}; only null and RESCHEDULED entries are editable.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Maker != checker is a financial-control segregation (SOX/COSO + ISO 37001, NOT ISO 9001). Maker (Finance-Maker) prepares; Checker (Chief Accountant) is the only second-person release gate. Withholding tax (TDS/WHT) on cross-border services, advance recoupment (recover prepayment
against later invoices), and retention/holdback (release on acceptance / warranty) all net down the release amount before processing.

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Amount breakdown (recomputed live, never cached): Paid = sum approvedAmount of PROCESSED; Upcoming = sum non-processed with date >= start-of-today; Overdue = sum non-processed with date < start-of-today (overdue boundary = 00:00:00 start-of-today, null date = upcoming); Pending =

- Paid, shortfall added to Upcoming. Creditor ledger per supplier (read-only to procurement). Cash float track: cash buy on configurable float (default OMR 300), cash GRN with NO PO reference, reimburse when float <= threshold (default ~OMR 100 left), destination = cash handler not supplier.
